why: Revise of sdd/collision-ladder: add the symbol rung (issue #189 star capstone, FIRST half -- symbol-level produce/consume dependency inference). A code file reaching the semantic rung now descends to a new symbol rung: each side's produced/consumed symbols classify it disjoint(soft, disjoint-symbols) / both-produce-same(hard, symbol-waw) / consume-what-other-produces(hard, symbol-raw, a true data dep) / un-inferable(hard, symbol-rung-deferred, conservative fallback). symbol is the deepest rung -> lowest confidence. Pure classifier over CONSTRUCTED symbol sets; diff->symbol extraction is the thin untested seam that yields null (defers) on an unparsed language/dynamic dispatch/no detail, so a parse gap never relaxes a real clash. RAW->hard user-ratified. One frozen scenario ('needing symbol analysis to downgrade ... not classified by symbol') NARROWED to the un-inferable fallback -- a re-open, user-ratified in-session before the edit; 3 additive symbol scenarios self-clear. Cold sdd-spec-judge round 1 ALIGNED false (architect FAIL: 3 stale README passages + root index still on the 3-rung ladder); fixed spec-prose-only, judge-iteration correction logged; round 2 ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect all PASS). SSA-lowering doctrine (third bullet second half) stays deferred; PR references #189, does not close it. Low blast (internal SDD engine, single-writer, no live consumers), leash auto-all.

Cold sdd-impl-judge re-derived all 21 frozen collision-ladder scenarios as independent oracles (ADR-0016); IMPLEMENTATION_PASS true, BLOCKER null, round 1 clean (no reject). The 4 symbol scenarios confirmed: disjoint-symbols->soft@symbol, symbol-waw->hard (both produce same symbol), symbol-raw->hard (one consumes what the other produces), un-inferable->hard symbol-rung-deferred. Structural read clean: honest pure/IO split (classifySymbols pure; extractSymbols the thin untested seam mirroring readFileHunks), the seam is CONSERVATIVE (null on non-TS/JS lang / git failure / nothing extracted, so a parse gap never relaxes a real clash), read-only w.r.t. the mission graph, genuine reuse of touch-set-correction collectChangedFiles/fileToNode, and NO SSA-lowering scope creep (symbol-waw/symbol-raw recorded as data only, never acted on). Mutation probes: null-guard inversion and reason-string garble both CAUGHT; three probes under-pinned (RAW reverse-direction, WAW/RAW precedence, symbol-vs-semantic RUNG_DEPTH ordering) but behavior confirmed correct by code read -- latent test-suite gaps, not contract violations. Self-hardened post-pass (test-only, frozen .feature untouched, behavior unchanged): extended the RAW test to pin BOTH directions (the judge's top regression risk); the remaining two precedence/depth probes logged as low-risk follow-up. Root pnpm verify green (20/20) on the origin/main-rebased tree. Low blast internal SDD engine, single-writer, no live consumers; leash auto-all.
